seoTitle: Oak Flats vs Oakey Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oak Flats and Oakey Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oak Flats vs Oakey Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oak Flats and Oakey Park.
heading: Oak Flats vs Oakey Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oak Flats, New South Wales and Oakey Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oakey Park has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Oak Flats (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oak Flats or Oakey Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oak Flats has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Oakey Park scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oak Flats scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Oakey Park scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oak Flats or Oakey Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oakey Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
